The '''''Abolisher''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] that was part of [[Task Force Vengeance]].

==History==
The ''Abolisher'' was part of the group of reinforcements that were pulled out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']]. In the ensuing [[Ambush in the Derilyn system|battle]], the ship was destroyed by the Rebels along with the rest of the reinforcing fleet.

{{Ship-stub}}
